system.description:
Convincingly avoiding the truth and misleading other people. Also covers forgery.
  • Forging a government document or seal: Deception/EDU 8+ (or Opposed)
  • Fast talking your way past a guard: Deception/SOC 10+
  • Bluffing about the state of the rag-tag villagers to keep bandit raiders away: Deception/INT 10+ (or Opposed)
  • Determine if someone is lying to you: Deception/INT (Opposed)
system.shortdescr: Avoiding the truth, misleading others, and forgery.
